title: refactor: rebuild store buttons as premium brand tiles
body:
## Description

Complete architectural refactor of the store button system from complex per-brand scaling to a simpler, cleaner variant-based approach.

### Changes

**CSS Refactoring:**
- Replaced .cta-featured-* and .cta-btn* classes with .brand-tile-* naming
- Featured button: 110px desktop, 88px mobile
- Regular buttons: 88px desktop, 72px mobile
- 2-variant system for logo sizing: variant-wide (72%) and variant-compact (78%)
- Tone system for contrast: tone-light for white-background logos
- Improved premium styling with refined shadows and borders

**JavaScript Refactoring:**
- Removed data-brand attributes
- New storeVariants object for logo sizing
- New storeTone object for contrast control
- Cleaner HTML generation
- Simplified rendering logic

**Responsive Design:**
- Updated media queries for max-width: 768px
- Mobile-first responsive adjustments

**Preserved Functionality:**
- All navigation links maintained
- Meta Pixel tracking integration intact
- Featured Diplan boutique card styling preserved

### Testing
- CSS compiles without errors
- JavaScript rendering works correctly
- Navigation links maintained
- Meta Pixel tracking updated
- Visual validation in browser needed
head: refactor/store-buttons-brand-tiles
